member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.IsExternalInit
member.summary: Enables C# 9 init-only setters on older frameworks.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CompilerFeatureRequiredAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that a type has required members or that a member is required.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CompilerFeatureRequiredAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Indicates that a type has required members or that a member is required.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.RequiredMemberAttribute
member.summary: Enables C# 11 required members on older frameworks.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Logging.Logger
member.summary: Provides a clean, flexible logging utility with optional complexity.

member.name: E:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.OnLog
member.summary: Event invoked when a log message is processed.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.MinimumLevel
member.summary: Minimum log level to process. Logs below this level are ignored. Default: .

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.BeginTimer(System.String,System.Nullable{Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory},System.Object)
member.summary: Begins a performance timer that logs the operation duration when disposed.
member.param: The name of the operation being timed.
Optional log category.
Optional context object.
member.returns: A disposable timer that logs when disposed (fully compiled away if DEBUG is not defined).

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.Log(System.Object,Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevel,System.Nullable{Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory},System.Object,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a message with optional complexity.
member.param: The message to log (string, number, object, FormattableString, etc.).
The severity level (default: Info).
Optional log category.
Optional context object (e.g., Unity Object for console highlighting).
Whether to automatically capture caller information.
Automatically populated with the calling member name via . Do not provide this parameter manually.
Automatically populated with the source file path via . Do not provide this parameter manually.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.Log(System.Exception,System.String,System.Nullable{Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory},System.Object,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an exception with automatic detail extraction.
member.param: The exception to log.
Optional custom message to prepend to the exception message for additional context.
Optional log category.
Optional context object (e.g., Unity Object for console highlighting).
Whether to automatically capture caller information (default: true).
Automatically populated with the calling member name via . Do not provide this parameter manually.
Automatically populated with the source file path via . Do not provide this parameter manually.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.LogError(System.Object,System.Nullable{Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory},System.Object,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an error message with optional complexity.
member.param: The message to log (string, number, object, FormattableString, etc.).
Optional log category.
Optional context object (e.g., Unity Object for console highlighting).
Whether to automatically capture caller information.
Automatically populated with the calling member name via . Do not provide this parameter manually.
Automatically populated with the source file path via . Do not provide this parameter manually.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.LogException(System.Exception,System.String,System.Nullable{Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory},System.Object,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an exception with automatic detail extraction.
member.param: The exception to log.
Optional custom message to prepend to the exception message for additional context.
Optional log category.
Optional context object (e.g., Unity Object for console highlighting).
Whether to automatically capture caller information (default: true).
Automatically populated with the calling member name via . Do not provide this parameter manually.
Automatically populated with the source file path via . Do not provide this parameter manually.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.LogSuccess(System.Object,System.Nullable{Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory},System.Object,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a success message with optional complexity.
member.param: The message to log (string, number, object, FormattableString, etc.).
Optional log category.
Optional context object (e.g., Unity Object for console highlighting).
Whether to automatically capture caller information.
Automatically populated with the calling member name via . Do not provide this parameter manually.
Automatically populated with the source file path via . Do not provide this parameter manually.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.LogWarning(System.Object,System.Nullable{Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory},System.Object,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a warning message with optional complexity.
member.param: The message to log (string, number, object, FormattableString, etc.).
Optional log category.
Optional context object (e.g., Unity Object for console highlighting).
Whether to automatically capture caller information.
Automatically populated with the calling member name via . Do not provide this parameter manually.
Automatically populated with the source file path via . Do not provide this parameter manually.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.ExtractTypeNameFromFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the type name from a file path (e.g., "GameManager" from "path/to/GameManager.cs").

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.FormatMessage(System.Object)
member.summary: Formats a message object into a string representation.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.FormatMessage(System.FormattableString)
member.summary: Formats a formattable string message with proper collection handling.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.GetTimeWindowGroup(System.DateTime,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates a time window group identifier based on the current time and configured window size.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Logger.BuildAndInvokePayload(System.String,Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevel,System.Nullable{Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory},System.Object,System.Exception,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the log payload and invokes the OnLog event.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.FileLocationConfig.FilenameOnly
member.summary: Creates an enabled file location configuration (filename only).

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.FileLocationConfig.FullPath
member.summary: Creates an enabled file location configuration (full path).

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.FileLocationConfig.ShowFullPath
member.summary: Whether to show full path or just filename.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.FrameCountConfig.Create(System.Func{System.Int32})
member.summary: Creates an enabled frame count configuration with the specified provider.
member.param: Function that returns the current frame count (e.g., () => Time.frameCount in Unity).

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.FrameCountConfig.Provider
member.summary: Provider function that returns the current frame count.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.GroupingConfig.Create(Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.ContextGrouping,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a grouping configuration with the specified strategy.
member.param: The grouping strategy.
Whether to include grouping info in the formatted message.
Time window for TimeWindow grouping.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.GroupingConfig.IncludeInOutput
member.summary: Whether to include grouping context in the formatted output.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.GroupingConfig.TimeWindowMs
member.summary: Time window in milliseconds for TimeWindow grouping (only used when GroupBy is TimeWindow).

member.name: T:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory
member.summary: Specifies the category of a log message for classification and filtering.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory.Lighting
member.summary: Lighting engine or lighting effect messages.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory.LevelGeneration
member.summary: Procedural or dynamic level generation messages.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory.Social
member.summary: Online services, friends, or social integration messages.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory.Purchasing
member.summary: Purchasing, microtransactions, or commerce system messages.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory.Camera
member.summary: Camera subsystem or visual frustum messages.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory.Utilities
member.summary: Utility and helper methods or modules.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory.Uci
member.summary: Universal Chess Interface or other application-specific protocols.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategoryEmoji
member.summary: Provides utility methods to get emoji representations for log categories.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategoryEmoji.GetEmoji(Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory)
member.summary: Gets the emoji representation for a specific log category.
member.param: The log category.
member.returns: Emoji string for the specified category, or ❓ if the category is not recognized.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.AsyncContextStack
member.summary: AsyncLocal stack that tracks async context hierarchy. Automatically flows through async/await boundaries.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings._sequenceNumber
member.summary: Log sequence counter for tracking log order.

remarks.para: Use to add a category to the list.
Use to remove a category from the list.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Master switch to enable/disable all logging at runtime.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.ErrorStyle
member.summary: Visual style for Error level logs.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.ExceptionStyle
member.summary: Visual style for Exception level logs.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.InfoStyle
member.summary: Visual style for Info level logs.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.SuccessStyle
member.summary: Visual style for Success level logs.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.WarningStyle
member.summary: Visual style for Warning level logs.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.CurrentAsyncContextHierarchy
member.summary: Gets the current async context hierarchy.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.BeginAsyncContext(System.String)
member.summary: Begins a new async context that automatically flows through async/await.
member.param: The name for this async context.
member.returns: A disposable that pops the context when disposed.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.GetStyle(Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevel)
member.summary: Gets the style for a specific log level.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.GetNextSequenceNumber
member.summary: Gets the next sequence number for log ordering.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.ContextGrouping
member.summary: Defines how logs should be grouped/contextualized.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.ContextGrouping.TimeWindow
member.summary: Group by time window (logs within TimeWindowMs are grouped together).

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.ContextGrouping.AsyncContext
member.summary: Group by async context (automatically flows through async/await).

member.name: T:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LoggerSettings.AsyncContextScope
member.summary: Internal scope for managing async context stack.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevel
member.summary: Defines the severity level for a log message.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevel.Info
member.summary: Informational messages used for general output.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevel.Warning
member.summary: Warnings that indicate a potential issue or non-critical problem.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevel.Error
member.summary: Errors indicating a problem that has occurred but does not stop execution.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevel.Exception
member.summary: Exceptions representing severe errors or unexpected failures.

member.name: F:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevel.Success
member.summary: Success notifications, used to indicate successful operations.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevelEmoji
member.summary: Provides utility methods to get emoji representations for log levels.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevelEmoji.GetEmoji(Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogLevel)
member.summary: Gets the emoji representation for a specific log level.
member.param: The log level.
member.returns: Emoji string for the specified level, or ❓ if the level is not recognized.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload
member.summary: Contains all data for a single log event.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.Timestamp
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the log was created.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.AsyncContextDepth
member.summary: Async context nesting depth (0 = no context, 1 = root, 2+ = nested).

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.Category
member.summary: Optional category for the log message.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.Level
member.summary: The severity level of the log.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.Style
member.summary: Visual style hints for rendering (color, bold, etc.).

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.ContextObject
member.summary: Optional context object (e.g., Unity Object for console highlighting).

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.FormattedMessage
member.summary: Fully formatted log message ready for output.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.AsyncContext
member.summary: Formatted async context string (format depends on LoggerSettings.AsyncFormat).

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.CategoryEmoji
member.summary: Emoji representing the category (if category is specified).

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.GroupingContext
member.summary: Automatic grouping context based on LoggerSettings.GroupBy.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogPayload.Stage
member.summary: Optional stage label included in the formatted output.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogStyle
member.summary: Defines visual styling for log output.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified visual styling options.
member.param: The console color to use for this log style.
Whether to render the text in bold. Default is false.
Whether to render the text in italic. Default is false.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogStyle.#ctor(System.ConsoleColor,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Defines visual styling for log output.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified visual styling options.
member.param: The console color to use for this log style.
Whether to render the text in bold. Default is false.
Whether to render the text in italic. Default is false.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogStyle.Bold
member.summary: Whether to render the text in bold.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogStyle.Italic
member.summary: Whether to render the text in italic.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogStyle.Color
member.summary: The color hint for this log style.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.StageConfig.Create(System.Func{System.String},System.Func{System.String,System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Creates an enabled stage configuration with the specified provider.
member.param: Function that returns the current stage label (e.g., "Entering Play Mode").
Function that returns the divider line for stage changes.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.StageConfig.DividerProvider
member.summary: Divider line provider to emit when the stage changes.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.StageConfig.Provider
member.summary: Provider function that returns the current stage label.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.StageConfig.DefaultDividerProvider(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Default divider line emitted on stage changes.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Types.TimestampConfig.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an enabled timestamp configuration with custom format.
member.param: Custom DateTime format string.

member.name: P:Bezoro.Logging.Types.TimestampConfig.Default
member.summary: Creates an enabled timestamp configuration with default format.

member.name: T:Bezoro.Logging.Utilities.PerformanceTimer
member.summary: Performance timer struct for zero-allocation timing. Fully compiled away in release builds for true zero overhead.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Utilities.PerformanceTimer.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{Bezoro.Logging.Types.LogCategory},System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct and starts timing.
member.param: The name of the operation being timed.
Optional log category for the completion message.
Optional context object to associate with the log entry.

member.name: M:Bezoro.Logging.Utilities.PerformanceTimer.Dispose
member.summary: Stops the timer and logs the elapsed time for the operation. Fully compiled away in release builds.
